summary: Presences UX Refonte - Iteration 130: All backend (11/11) and frontend tests pass. Backend API enrichment verified (appointment_type, appointment_location, appointment_meeting_provider). Frontend PresencesPage correctly displays cards with full RDV context, CTAs 'Remplir ma feuille'/'Voir ma declaration', breadcrumb, pending count badge. AttendanceSheetPage shows read-only view for submitted sheets with data-testid='sheet-readonly-view'. Submitted cards have NO opacity-70 or disabled state.

backend_api_tests.test_06_sheet_detail_returns_enriched_co: PASS - appointment_title, appointment_start_datetime, appointment_duration_minutes, appointment_type, appointment_location, appointment_meeting_provider
backend_api_tests.test_09_submitted_sheet_detail_has_decla: PASS - Submitted sheets in resolved phase

frontend_submitted_sheet_tests.readonly_declarations: PASS - 1 readonly declaration with target_name and status

backend_sheet_detail_enrichment.description: GET /api/attendance-sheets/{id} returns appointment_title, appointment_start_datetime, appointment_duration_minutes, appointment_type, appointment_location, appointment_meeting_provider

frontend_pending_count_badge.description: Header shows pending count badge (e.g., '5 a remplir')

frontend_sheet_card_context.description: Cards show title, date+time, duration, type/location, targets count, deadline, badge, CTAs

frontend_cta_remplir_ma_feuille.description: Pending cards show 'Remplir ma feuille' CTA

frontend_cta_voir_ma_declaration.description: Submitted cards show 'Voir ma declaration' CTA

frontend_voir_le_rendez_vous_link.description: 'Voir le rendez-vous' link on each card

frontend_attendance_sheet_context.description: Sheet page shows appointment context (title, date+time, duration, type, location)

frontend_readonly_view.description: Submitted mode shows read-only view with data-testid='sheet-readonly-view'

frontend_readonly_declarations.description: Each declaration shows target_name and declared_status with data-testid='readonly-declaration-{id}'

frontend_submitted_badge_breadcrumb.description: Submitted mode shows 'Soumise' badge and breadcrumb says 'Ma declaration'

frontend_no_opacity_on_submitted.description: Submitted cards have NO opacity-70 or disabled state

critical_code_review_comments: Backend enrichment correctly implemented at declarative_routes.py lines 36-40 and 115-127
Frontend PresencesPage correctly displays all required card elements with proper data-testid attributes
Frontend AttendanceSheetPage correctly shows read-only view for submitted sheets
STATUS_DISPLAY map correctly transforms declared_status to French labels with appropriate colors
Submitted cards are fully clickable (no opacity-70, no disabled state)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Presences UX Refonte verified. Key features: (1) Backend enrichment adds appointment_type, appointment_location, appointment_meeting_provider to both /api/attendance-sheets/pending and /api/attendance-sheets/{id}, (2) Frontend PresencesPage shows cards with full RDV context, CTAs, breadcrumb, pending count badge, (3) Frontend AttendanceSheetPage shows read-only view for submitted sheets with data-testid='sheet-readonly-view', (4) Submitted cards have NO opacity-70 or disabled state. Test data: igaal@hotmail.com has 5 pending sheets (AUDIT4-FULLY-PAST, AUDIT D, Test Cancel D, AUDIT C, Test Cancel C - all physical, Paris). testuser_audit@nlyt.app has 2 submitted sheets (test dispute 2, création edimbourg) and 3 pending.
